Title: Customizable Print Unisex T-Shirt with Standard Sizing Guide
Description:
Showcase your unique design with our high-quality, comfortable unisex t-shirt. Perfect for custom events, team wear, personal gifts, or just expressing your style.

Material & Feel:

  • Our shirts are made from premium, breathable cotton blends (specific blend details may vary). They feel soft against the skin and offer excellent comfort for all-day wear.
  • The durable print application ensures your design remains vibrant and intact, wash after wash.

Fit & Sizing:

We have provided a detailed sizing chart (Imperial and Metric) to ensure you select the perfect fit. The shirt is designed with a comfortable, unisex fit, suitable for a wide range of body types. Please note that all measurements are provided for accuracy and may have manufacturing tolerances.

Ideal For:

  • Family reunion shirts
  • Small business branding and merchandise
  • Concert or event souvenirs
  • Personalized gifts and novelty wear

Care Instructions:

Machine wash inside-out with cold water and gentle detergent. Tumble dry low or hang to dry to maintain the vibrancy of the print and the integrity of the fabric.
